Black_Battery.disposal_method: Handover to authorized e-waste recyclers or pollution control board authorized collection centers.

recycling_value.estimated_value: Medium to High depending on volume
recycling_value.selling_method: Bulk sale to registered e-waste processors or brand-led buyback programs.

Black_Battery.environmental_impact: Severe groundwater contamination and heavy metal leaching if landfilled; toxic fumes if incinerated improperly.
safety_precautions: Do not puncture or incinerate
Store in a cool dry place away from moisture
Tape terminals to prevent short-circuiting

recycling_value.selling_method: None

Black_DailyDust.environmental_impact: Contributes to landfill volume; contains microparticles and household dust mites but generally chemically stable.
safety_precautions: Avoid inhaling while transferring
Keep contained in a sealed bag to prevent airborne dispersion

Black_Keyboard.disposal_method: E-waste collection drives or localized scrap dealers (Kabadiwalas) handling electronic components.

recycling_value.selling_method: Sold by weight or per piece to local scrap markets (e.g., Seelampur in Delhi or SJP Road in Bengaluru).

reuse_suggestions: Repurpose working switches for custom mechanical builds
Donate to educational institutes for hardware repair training
Black_Keyboard.environmental_impact: Slow degradation of plastics and microplastic pollution if dumped open environment.
safety_precautions: Do not smash or break apart bare components outdoors
Wash hands after handling internal wiring

Black_Microwave.disposal_method: Authorized e-waste recycler pickup or exchange programs run by electronic appliance brands.

recycling_value.selling_method: Direct negotiation with local e-waste scrap aggregators or formal recycling vendors.

reuse_suggestions: Repair and use as a food warmer
Utilize the heavy-duty metal casing for storage boxes after stripping circuitry
Black_Microwave.environmental_impact: High embedded carbon footprint; potential exposure to beryllium copper in internal components if physically dismantled without proper safety equipment.
safety_precautions: Never open the magnetron casing due to beryllium oxide hazards
Discharge high-voltage capacitors before handling internal circuits

Black_Mobile.disposal_method: Mobile store drop-off bins, exchange programs, or formal e-waste recyclers.

recycling_value.selling_method: Online recommerce platforms (Cashify, Instacash) or registered urban e-waste aggregators.

reuse_suggestions: Use as a dedicated security camera using apps
Repurpose as a permanent media player or digital clock
Black_Mobile.environmental_impact: Loss of scarce precious metals if thrown into municipal bins; high environmental degradation during replacement mining.
safety_precautions: Remove battery if swollen before disposal
Perform complete factory data reset to protect privacy

Black_Mouse.disposal_method: E-waste collection drop points or standard local electronic repair shops.

recycling_value.selling_method: Sold by piece weight to local electronics scrap dealers.

reuse_suggestions: Salvage scroll wheel and microswitches for DIY repair electronics projects
Black_Mouse.environmental_impact: Non-biodegradable plastics accumulate in landfills, lingering for hundreds of years.
safety_precautions: Do not cut the cord inside closed living areas to avoid breathing PVC dust particles

Black_PCB.disposal_method: Must be sent strictly to authorized high-tech precious metal recovery refineries.

recycling_value.estimated_value: High based on precious metal density
recycling_value.selling_method: B2B bulk contract sales to licensed metallurgic recycling corporations.

Black_PCB.environmental_impact: Acid washing or open-air burning by informal sector causes devastating air and soil toxic pollution in surrounding communities.
safety_precautions: Wear gloves to handle to prevent glass fiber splinters
Do not heat, burn, or treat with domestic acids

Black_Player.disposal_method: Electronic waste drop-off zones or local scrap dealers handling old home appliances.

recycling_value.selling_method: Weight-based pricing estimation at standard city metal scrap yards.

reuse_suggestions: Convert casing into vintage style desktop organizers
Use functional audio amplification circuits for custom stereos
Black_Player.environmental_impact: Landfill accumulation of plastics and heavy solder materials containing small traces of lead.
safety_precautions: Ensure power cord is fully severed to prevent accidental plugging by children

Blue_Cardboard.disposal_method: Standard dry waste segregation stream or door-to-door paper collectors.

recycling_value.selling_method: Sold by weight directly to local Kabadiwalas or paper mill agents.

reuse_suggestions: Storage boxes for home moving
Cut up for use as weed suppressing mulch layer in gardens
DIY cat scratching pads
Blue_Cardboard.environmental_impact: Highly biodegradable but generates methane gas if trapped anaerobically in wet landfills.
safety_precautions: Keep dry and free of food grease to preserve recycling value
Flatten boxes to conserve transport energy space

Blue_Glass.disposal_method: Glass collection systems or municipal dry sorting facilities.

recycling_value.selling_method: Sold by weight to local bottle vendors or specialized glass manufacturing aggregators.

reuse_suggestions: Sterilize and use for kitchen spice storage
DIY decorative indoor planters or candle holders
Blue_Glass.environmental_impact: Infinitely recyclable without quality loss, significantly reducing kiln energy requirements in glass factories.
safety_precautions: Handle with thick gloves if cracked or shattered
Wrap broken pieces in thick paper before placing in bin

Blue_Metal.disposal_method: Local scrap yards, dry waste collection centers, or informal scrap collectors.

recycling_value.selling_method: Direct weight-based sale to local metal recyclers or foundry buyers.

reuse_suggestions: Organizing small screws, nails, or stationery in the workshop
Creative scrap metal sculpture and art installation work
Blue_Metal.environmental_impact: Saves up to ninety-five percent of energy compared to extracting virgin metals from raw ores.
safety_precautions: Beware of sharp jagged edges and rust
Rinse out residual content from metal food cans to avoid insects

Blue_Paper.disposal_method: Dry waste pickup systems or school/office paper collection drives.

recycling_value.selling_method: Sold to local paper scrap merchants for repulping into newsprint or tissue grades.

reuse_suggestions: Use blank reverse sides for rough calculations or printing drafts
Shred for packaging cushioning material
Blue_Paper.environmental_impact: Reduces deforestation pressures when returned safely to paper mills.
safety_precautions: Do not mix shredded paper loosely without bagging as it blows away easily
Keep clean of oily substances

Blue_PaperCups.disposal_method: Dry waste sorting lines or multi-layer plastic processing units.

valuable_materials: Paper fiber matrix bonded with Polyethylene lining
recycling_value.selling_method: Rarely accepted by standard paper collectors due to separating complications; sold to specialized downcycling plants if clean.

reuse_suggestions: Seedling starter pots for home gardening since paper weakens for root transition
Blue_PaperCups.environmental_impact: Plastic wax coating prevents standard composting, causing long term residue issues in normal sorting lines.
safety_precautions: Empty completely of hot liquids before dropping in bins to avoid contamination of other dry items

Blue_PlasticBottels.disposal_method: Reverse vending machines, municipal plastic bins, or direct sales to waste collectors.

recycling_value.estimated_value: High (Highly sought after in plastic market)
recycling_value.selling_method: Sold by weight to plastic recycling aggregators for transformation into polyester fiber textile yarns.

reuse_suggestions: Drip irrigation bottles for household potted plants
DIY bird feeders
Blue_PlasticBottels.environmental_impact: Mitigates ocean plastic accumulation and reduces reliance on petroleum feedstocks for fresh plastic creation.
safety_precautions: Crush the bottle to prevent reuse by unauthorized counterfeit beverage fillers

Blue_PlasticCutlery.disposal_method: Waste-to-energy plants or cement kiln co-processing facilities.

recycling_value.selling_method: Mixed with generic low-grade plastics sold for road construction blends or industrial fuel.

reuse_suggestions: Wash and store for household plant labeling stakes
Blue_PlasticCutlery.environmental_impact: Fragmentizes into pervasive microplastics that enter food chains; rarely recycled due to small weight and high sorting labor costs.
safety_precautions: Clean grease off before discarding to avoid foul smell or pest attraction in dry storage areas

Blue_PlasticTrashBag.disposal_method: Dry plastic collection streams or plastic bag compilation hubs.

recycling_value.selling_method: Bulk baled collection sold to low-grade film extrusion recyclers.

reuse_suggestions: Reuse multiple times for dry material carrying before final structural failure
Blue_PlasticTrashBag.environmental_impact: Easily carried by wind causing animal choking hazards and clogging drainage networks across cities.
safety_precautions: Tie in a loose knot so it does not capture air or entangle sorting conveyor belts

Blue_PlasticWrapper.disposal_method: Sent for co-processing in cement factories or used in specialized asphalt road laying mixtures.

recycling_value.selling_method: Collected and sold in bulk tons to infrastructure contractors or municipal processors under Extended Producer Responsibility mandates.

reuse_suggestions: Collect tightly into clean plastic bottles to make structural eco-bricks for garden borders
Blue_PlasticWrapper.environmental_impact: Major contributor to visual pollution and drainage blockages; practically impossible to recycle mechanically via standard methods.
safety_precautions: Ensure plastic wrappers are dry to prevent mold growth inside accumulated storage bins

Blue_StyrofoamCups.disposal_method: Specialized high-volume compression collection centers or designated landfills.

recycling_value.selling_method: Rarely purchased due to high volume, low density transportation costs unless densified first mechanically.

reuse_suggestions: Break into tiny pieces to use as soil aeration filler inside deep heavy ceramic flower planters
Blue_StyrofoamCups.environmental_impact: Occupies extensive landfill volume; breaks down into toxic chemical beads that absorb surrounding ambient toxins.
safety_precautions: Do not attempt to burn at home as it releases highly toxic styrene gas fumes

Blue_StyrofoamFoodContainer.disposal_method: Landfill or industrial waste-to-energy incineration plants.

recycling_value.selling_method: None

Blue_StyrofoamFoodContainer.environmental_impact: Stays un-degraded in soil environments for centuries; food oil contamination makes it completely useless for standard industrial reclamation.
safety_precautions: Scrape away organic food residues before throwing to prevent active fungal infestations

Green_AnimalDung.disposal_method: Biogas plant digesters or localized agricultural composting units.

recycling_value.estimated_value: Medium (High utility value in rural markets)
recycling_value.selling_method: Sold directly to rural organic farming operations or collective bio-CNG generation plants.

reuse_suggestions: Sun-dry to create traditional fuel cakes
Mix with farm yard waste for vermicomposting bed setups
Green_AnimalDung.environmental_impact: Emits direct methane gas into the open atmosphere if left untreated in large waterlogged piles.
safety_precautions: Wash hands thoroughly after contact
Keep separate from kitchen areas to prevent pathogen transfer

Green_CoffeeGrounds.disposal_method: Wet waste household composting or community aerobic windrow piles.

recycling_value.selling_method: Can be supplied locally to organic gardening nurseries or small-scale body scrub manufacturers.

reuse_suggestions: Direct application as acid-loving plant fertilizer for roses or tomatoes
Natural refrigerator odor absorber
Green_CoffeeGrounds.environmental_impact: Enriches target soil microbiomes and improves water retention qualities of local ground earth.
safety_precautions: Do not apply thick wet layers directly on plant roots to avoid surface mold formation

Green_DryLeaf.disposal_method: Community park leaf composters or mulching zones.

recycling_value.selling_method: Traded or shared locally within home gardening networks needing brown balancing matter.

reuse_suggestions: Crush to create mulch layers for preserving garden soil moisture
Essential carbon source material for home compost bins
Green_DryLeaf.environmental_impact: Open burning of leaves releases severe particulate matter (PM2.5) causing breathing problems in urban cities.
safety_precautions: Ensure no plastic tags or wires are mixed within collected leaf heaps

Green_Eggshells.disposal_method: Home compost bins or municipal wet organic processing trucks.

recycling_value.selling_method: None

reuse_suggestions: Crush finely and sprinkle around base of garden plants to deter soft-bodied pests like slugs
Add to indoor houseplant soil for slow-release calcium nutrient boost
Green_Eggshells.environmental_impact: Decomposes cleanly without offensive odor issues if kept exposed to oxygenated conditions.
safety_precautions: Rinse or let dry briefly to prevent potential salmonella bacteria growth in open containers

Green_FoodWaste.disposal_method: Biogas digestion facilities, decentralized community organic waste converters (OWC).

recycling_value.estimated_value: Medium when processed into high-quality soil conditioners
recycling_value.selling_method: Processed bulk compost sales to commercial nurseries, tea estates, or landscaping businesses.

reuse_suggestions: Citrus peels can be utilized to ferment homemade bio-enzyme liquid house cleaners
Green_FoodWaste.environmental_impact: Unsegregated wet food waste generates highly toxic dark leachate liquid that destroys groundwater quality near landfills.
safety_precautions: Drain excessive water liquids before placing into green bins to minimize active foul smell generation

Green_GarderFlower.disposal_method: Temple/Event waste processing channels or community composting.

recycling_value.estimated_value: Low to Medium (High in specific Indian festive contexts)
recycling_value.selling_method: Bulk supply to specialized social enterprises processing floral waste into incense sticks or natural colors.

reuse_suggestions: Dry petals for making natural homemade potpourri scent bags
Extract colors for artistic painting or fabric dyeing dye projects
Green_GarderFlower.environmental_impact: Diverting floral waste from direct river disposal prevents water eutrophication and preserves aquatic fish life.
safety_precautions: Check for attached plastic threads, strings, or metal pins used in decorative garlands

Green_SpoilFood.disposal_method: Anaerobic industrial biogas digesters or deep landfill composting sites.

recycling_value.selling_method: Delivered to commercial urban bio-methanation plants managed by local municipal bodies.

Green_SpoilFood.environmental_impact: Rapid anaerobic decomposition generates intensive methane emission plumes if not capped efficiently.
safety_precautions: Avoid touching active mold growth sections with bare hands
Keep bin tightly sealed to keep wild flies and animals away

Green_TeaBags.disposal_method: Composting systems (only after verifying paper-grade non-plastic composition).

recycling_value.selling_method: None

reuse_suggestions: Cool down used tea bags to place over closed eyes to soothe puffiness
Buried near plant roots to maintain moisture levels
Green_TeaBags.environmental_impact: Many modern commercial tea bags contain hidden plastic sealing webs which leave microplastic mesh in finished compost piles.
safety_precautions: Snip off staple pins and synthetic brand tags before putting the bag into organic composters

Red_BloodSoakedBandages.disposal_method: Incineration at licensed Common Bio-medical Waste Treatment Facilities (CBWTF).

recycling_value.selling_method: None

Red_BloodSoakedBandages.environmental_impact: High risk of spreading blood-borne pathogen infections (Hepatitis, HIV) to sanitation workers and animal scavengers.
safety_precautions: Handle using thick rubber gloves and medical forceps
Must be collected in leak-proof yellow/red bio-hazard marked non-chlorinated plastic bags

Red_Diapers.disposal_method: High-temperature incineration or deep isolated sanitary landfilling cells.

recycling_value.selling_method: None

Red_Diapers.environmental_impact: Superabsorbent polymers (SAP) and plastic outer layers take up to five hundred years to disintegrate in standard soil conditions.
safety_precautions: Roll inside out tightly and seal with external tape or newspaper wrap before throwing
Keep separate from dry scrap materials

Red_ExpiredTablets.disposal_method: Take-back programs organized by pharma associations or secure chemical landfill encapsulation.

recycling_value.selling_method: None

Red_ExpiredTablets.environmental_impact: Active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) leak into public water systems, inducing drug-resistance in wild bacteria and mutating fish populations.
safety_precautions: Keep out of reach of children and stray animals
Do not crush or flush down household toilets or drains

Red_SanitaryPad.disposal_method: Localized small-scale electric incinerators or municipal sanitary waste treatment pipelines.

recycling_value.selling_method: None

Red_SanitaryPad.environmental_impact: Creates massive unhygienic working hazards for manual waste pickers who tear unsegregated garbage packages.
safety_precautions: Wrap carefully inside designated paper disposal bags provided by manufacturers or old newspapers marked with a red dot

Red_SyrupBottles.disposal_method: Disinfection and washing followed by specialized crushing for controlled technical recycling streams.

recycling_value.selling_method: Bulk lot sales from clinics directly to specialized scrap aggregators handling pharmaceutical glass containers.

Red_SyrupBottles.environmental_impact: Residual chemicals might leach out if dumped on regular open municipal sorting yards.
safety_precautions: Triple rinse internal chamber thoroughly if possible before discarding
Keep caps loosely fitted to prevent vapor expansion pressures

Red_UsedGloves.disposal_method: Autoclaving followed by shredding or high temperature thermal destruction at authorized facilities.

recycling_value.selling_method: None

Red_UsedGloves.environmental_impact: Improper disposal allows black-market operators to wash and illegally repackage them for commercial food outlets.
safety_precautions: Mutilate or cut the gloves into pieces at point of disposal to prevent illegal resale reuse scams
Do not mix with home office trash

Red_UsedMasks.disposal_method: Incineration or shredding after appropriate 72-hour quarantine holding times.

recycling_value.selling_method: None

Red_UsedMasks.environmental_impact: Polypropylene fiber components degrade slowly into microplastics; elastic loops cause severe entanglement injuries to local urban birds and stray animals.
safety_precautions: Cut the ear loops before throwing away into the red bin
Store in separate container away from standard domestic kitchen waste zones
